description: Seed queries used by the salient-sentence extractor to score per-chunk sentences for RDR-corpus salience (decisions, rationale, alternatives considered, acceptance criteria).
seeds: What decision is being made or accepted in this section?
What is the rationale or justification for the chosen approach?
What alternatives were considered and why were they rejected?
What are the acceptance criteria or success conditions?
What risks, deviations, or open questions are documented?
